name: villa-lux
title: Villa Lux Bali Romantic Elegant 2BR Pool Villa
description: A hidden tropical oasis designed for romantic escapes. Your private tropical hideaway in Petitenget. Villa Lux Bali is a charming newly renovated 2-bedroom pool villa in the vibrant heart of Seminyak. Walk to Potato Head Beach Club and W Hotel, surrounded by top restaurants including Mauri, Merah Putih, Amici, Fu House, Bambu, Zia Tina and Gaia Gelato. Relax in your private tropical retreat while enjoying the lively Seminyak lifestyle. Located in a secure villa complex with 24/7 security.The spaceWelcome to Villa Lux Bali, a romantic and elegant 2-bedroom retreat tucked away on a peaceful private street in the heart of Petitenget.A hidden oasis in the heart of PetitengetExperience authentic open-air Balinese living, designed to embrace the tropical breeze and relaxed island atmosphere.Located in a secure villa complex just steps from Potato Head Beach Club and only 550 meters from Petitenget Beach and the iconic La Lucciola, the villa offers the perfect balance of privacy and vibrant Seminyak lifestyle.Recently renovated, Villa Lux blends modern comfort with traditional Balinese charm, featuring a classic open-air living space that connects indoor comfort with the beauty of tropical surroundings.The two spacious bedrooms offer ensuite bathrooms with bathtubs, high ceilings, safes and blackout curtains for ultimate relaxation.Outside, your private pool and sun terrace invite you to swim, sunbathe or unwind with a drink surrounded by lush greenery.Within walking distance you’ll find some of Petitenget’s most celebrated restaurants and lifestyle spots, including Mauri, Merah Putih, Fu House, Bambu, Amici, Sea Salt at Alila, Café Organic, along with Potato Head Beach Club, W Hotel Seminyak, Mano Beach Club, Motel Mexicola and ShiShi Club for dining, beach days and vibrant nightlife.Villa Lux is the perfect hideaway for couples, friends and families with children seeking a stylish tropical escape in one of Bali’s most lively neighborhoods.Kindly note:Due to Bali’s tropic
